airdrop.mnemonicClaimDialogText: Please sign message to prove ownership of your assets. Signing this message will not affect your wallet’s balance in any way and does not require you to pay any fees.

api.errors.getMultiAssetMintMetadataApiE: Error received from server while querying minting metadata.

api.errors.poolMissingApiError: No se pudo localizar este stake pool. Revisa su ID y asegúrate de que no fue dado de baja.

La conexión con el servidor falló.
Por favor, comprueba tu conexión a Internet, o visita nuestra cuenta en Twitter.
api.errors.unusedAddressesError: No puedes generar más de 20 direcciones sin usar, de forma consecutiva.
app.errors.storageLoadError: Error al acceder al almacenamiento. Yoroi necesita acceder al almacenamiento ("IndexedDB") para manejar adecuadamente las billeteras. Es posible que tu navegador no sea compatible con IndexedDB, o que esta característica esté desactivada debido a la configuración de privacidad (como la navegación privada)
app.errors.unableToLoad: No es posible cargar el contenido
app.errors.unexpectedError: Sucedió algo inesperado. Por favor, inténtalo nuevamente.
banners.bring.title: Earn ADA while you shop 🛍️
banners.bring.desc: Get rewarded with instant ADA cashback on every fiat purchase - stack up your portfolio effortlessly.
banners.usda.title: Swap USDA with Yoroi
banners.usda.desc: Swap USDA effortlessly within Yoroi and enjoy the power of Cardano's first native stablecoin.
banners.midnight.takePartInMidnight: Take part in the Midnight NIGHT token distribution
banners.midnight.midnightSupport: Yoroi will support Midnight’s multi-phase token distribution — a bold initiative to empower a diverse, global community.
buysell.dialog.disclaimerText: Yoroi Wallet utilizes third-party web3 on-and-off ramp solutions for direct Fiat-ADA exchanges.  By clicking "Proceed," you acknowledge that you will be redirected to our partner's website, where you may need to accept their terms and conditions.  Please note, the third party web3 solution may have limitations based on your location and financial institution.
buysell.dialog.error.dialog.title: url generation
buysell.dialog.fail.text: This service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
buysell.dialog.longloading.text: We are redirecting you outside Yoroi. Please wait.
buysell.dialog.title: Comprar / Vender ADA
buysell.end.text: Congrats! 🎉 Your transaction is now in progress. You should be receiving the funds soon.
buySell.disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
buySell.disclaimer.description: By clicking "Proceed," you acknowledge that you will be redirected to a third-party service provider offering Web3 on-and-off ramp solutions for fiat-to-ADA exchanges. You may be required to agree to the terms, conditions, and privacy policies of the third-party provider to complete the transaction. Yoroi Wallet does not control, endorse, or assume responsibility for the content, security, policies, or services provided by the third party.
buySell.disclaimer.note1: Yoroi Wallet is not liable for any losses, delays, or errors that may occur while using the third-party service.
buySell.disclaimer.note2: Transactions may be subject to restrictions based on your geographic location, applicable laws, financial institution policies, or the service provider's limitations.
buySell.disclaimer.note3: Ensure you review and understand the third party's terms, as your interactions are solely governed by their agreements.
buySell.disclaimer.note4: Yoroi Wallet does not collect or store any personal or financial data submitted through the third-party platform.
cashback.claim.dialog.instruction.hardwa: Confirm on your hardware wallet to claim cashback rewards.
cashback.claim.dialog.instruction.passwo: Enter your password to claim cashback rewards.
cashback.claim.dialog.message.label: Message
cashback.claim.dialog.title: CLAIM CASHBACK
cashback.disclaimer: By clicking "Proceed," you acknowledge that you will be redirected to a third-party service provider offering cashback services in ADA currency. You may be required to agree to the terms, conditions, and privacy policies of the third-party provider to complete the transaction. Yoroi Wallet does not control, endorse, or assume responsibility for the content, security, policies, or services provided by the third party.
cashback.disclaimer.note.1: 1. Yoroi Wallet is not liable for any losses, delays, or errors that may occur while using the third-party service.
cashback.disclaimer.note.2: 2. Transactions may be subject to restrictions based on your geographic location, applicable laws, financial institution policies, or the service provider's limitations.
cashback.disclaimer.note.3: 3. Ensure you review and understand the third party's terms, as your interactions are solely governed by their agreements.
cashback.disclaimer.note.4: 4. Yoroi Wallet does not collect or store any personal or financial data submitted through the third-party platform.
cashback.not.current.warning.text: Your cashback rewards are currently linked to another wallet. To claim your ADA cashback, either switch to the rewards wallet or change the rewards wallet to the one you're using now. You can always access settings at anytime to change your cashback wallet and make claiming rewards relevant for you.
cashback.not.current.warning.text.choose: Your cashback rewards are currently linked to another wallet.
Switch wallet to access your rewards or set this wallet as your cashback wallet.
cashback.not.current.warning.text.switch: You will no longer be able to claim rewards linked to your previous cashback wallet until you link it again.

maintenance.screen.explanation: Yoroi se encuentra en modo de mantenimiento. Aún puedes acceder a tus fondos a través de cualquier otro software de billetera.

networkError.label.message: Server connection failed.{newLine}Please check your internet connection or reach out to our support team <zendeskLink>here</zendeskLink>.
notprod.label.message: ADVERTENCIA: Esta versión no es de producción. Si no lo sabías, vuelve a comprobar la instalación de Yoroi.
profile.analytics.collectedData: Collected data includes: visited Yoroi extension pages, browser version, selected language, time of analytical events
profile.analytics.line1: Provide anonymous analytics about visited extension pages, browser version, selected language, time of analytical events
profile.analytics.line2: You can always opt-out via Settings and it won’t impact your experience
profile.analytics.rejectionImpact: Opting out won’t impact your experience
profile.analytics.share: Share user insights to help us fine tune Yoroi to better serve user preferences and needs.
profile.analytics.title: Join the journey to improve Yoroi
profile.complexityLevel.advanced.descrip: Tengo cierta comprensión de la blockchain y de cómo la criptografía se utiliza para impulsar tanto la propia blockchain como el software de la billetera. Estoy de acuerdo con ver opciones y funcionalidad que dependen fundamentalmente de mi comprensión sobre estos conceptos.
profile.complexityLevel.selected.label: Tu actual Nivel de Complejidad es
profile.complexityLevel.selected.labelWi: Your current level of Complexity is : {level}
profile.complexityLevel.simple.descripti: La experiencia más simple posible. No se requieren conocimientos previos en Blockchain. Muy amigable para los principiantes a bordo, y para los usuarios que prefieren la simplicidad.
profile.complexityLevel.subtitle: Comprender la blockchain puede ser difícil, por lo que trataremos de mantener la interfaz lo más simple posible para ti
profile.complexityLevel.title: Nivel de Complejidad de la Interfaz
profile.languageSelect.title: Language Select
profile.languageSelect.tosAgreement: I agree with <tosLink>Terms of Service Agreement</tosLink> and <privacyLink>Privacy Notice</privacyLink>
profile.nightly.header: Yoroi Nightly is periodically updated with the latest in-progress features. Although we will never intentionally push bugs or broken code, features may still be in-progress or contain errors.
profile.nightly.recommendation1: Usa billeteras con poco saldo para minimizar el riesgo.
profile.nightly.recommendation2: Reporta cualquier problema a EMURGO a través del canal Yoroi Nightly.
profile.nightly.title: Yoroi Nightly
profile.nightly.warning1: Yoroi Nightly NO opera sobre una blockchain simulada o a través de un servidor de prueba.
profile.nightly.warning2: Cualquier transacción que realices será visible en la cadena y en los servidores de producción.
profile.nightly.warningHeader: Para simular un entorno de producción:
profile.termsOfUse.updateText: We have updated our Terms of Service Agreement and Privacy Policy to enhance your experience. Please review and accept them to keep enjoying Yoroi.
profile.termsOfUse.updateTitle: Terms of Service Agreement and Privacy Notice update
profile.uriAccept.seePrompt: Simplemente haz clic en Permitir para habilitar URLs de pago
profile.uriPrompt.form.explanation: ¿Deseas habilitar las URLs de pago de Cardano?
profile.uriPrompt.form.heading: Allow Cardano Payment URLs
serverError.label.message: WARNING: Server experiencing difficulties.{newLine}Please check <yoroiXLink>our Twitter account</yoroiXLink>.{newLine}The displayed balance and transaction history may appear incorrect until our servers are back to normal, but your actual balance is not affected.
settings.display.blog: You can read our {blogLink} on how to use this feature.
settings.externalStorage.intro: Selecciona un servicio de almacenamiento externo para conectar tu cuenta y guardar tus memos.
settings.externalStorage.title: Conectar una cuenta
settings.general.aboutYoroi.label: Acerca de Yoroi
settings.general.languageSelect.info: Para EMURGO, la familiaridad en Yoroi es un tema importante. Creemos que entender los conceptos de la blockchain es más fácil en tu idioma nativo. Intentamos apoyar tantos idiomas como sea posible, pero para una selección más amplia de idiomas necesitamos aceptar la ayuda de traductores de la comunidad. La traducción del idioma seleccionado es proporcionada en su totalidad por la comunidad.
settings.general.languageSelect.labelInf: La traducción del idioma elegido es proporcionada en su totalidad por la comunidad
settings.general.switchNetwork.dialog.te: The Cardano network is a technical infrastructure combining Cardano nodes and their interactions in one unified system. It consists of a collection of nodes that communicate with each other to maintain the distributed ledger.
settings.general.translation.acknowledgm: Gracias a los siguientes miembros por su contribución:
settings.general.testnetModal.title: What are the test networks?
settings.general.testnetModal.subtitle: The test networks serve as a platform for the community and developers to test products and experiments without risking real funds on the mainnet.
settings.general.testnetModal.cannotBeSe: Cannot be sent to mainnet wallets.
settings.general.testnetModal.easilyObta: Are easily obtainable from Cardano faucets.
settings.general.testnetModal.learnMore: Learn more about networks in Cardano

settings.support.logs.content: Si deseas inspeccionar los logs (registros), puedes {downloadLogsLink}. Los logs no contienen información sensible, y adjuntarlos en reportes de errores puede ser útil para que el equipo investigue el problema que estás experimentando.

settings.support.reportProblem.content: Si las preguntas frecuentes (FAQ) no resuelven el problema que está experimentando, utiliza nuestro servicio de soporte: {supportRequestLink}.

settings.cashback.title: Cashback rewards wallet
settings.cashback.note: Your connected wallet is the designated wallet for receiving ADA cashback rewards and applied to all partner websites. You can switch to a different wallet anytime to ensure your cashback is directed to your preferred wallet or select “None” to decline this service.
settings.cashback.label: Connected wallet
survey,description: Take our quick survey to help shape the future of Yoroi.
survey.title: We’d love your feedback!
swap.slippageInputInfo: Enter a value from 0% to 75%. You can also enter up to 1 decimal
swap.slippageInfo: Maximum allowed difference between expected and final price. Higher slippage improves success but may result in worse rates.
swap.actions.slippageToleranceTooltip: Slippage tolerance is set as a percentage of the total swap value. Your transactions will not be executed if the price moves by more than this amount
swap.actions.slippageToleranceHigh: When the slippage tolerance is set really high, it allows the transaction to still complete despite large price swings. This can open the door to front-running and sandwich attacks.
swap.cancelOrder.title: Cancel order
swap.cancelOrder.content: Are you sure you want to cancel this order?
swap.totalReturnedTooltip: The amount returned to your wallet after cancelling the order
swap.routePath: Chosen path using Dexs and Pools for your swap to go through.
swap.limitPriceTooltip: Limit price in a DEX is a specific pre-set price at which you can trade an asset. Unlike market orders, which execute immediately at the current market price, limit orders are set to execute only when the market reaches the trader's specified price.
swap.limitPriceContent: Are you sure you want to proceed this order with the limit price that is 10% or more higher than the market price?
swap.marketPriceTooltip: Market price is the best price available on the market among several DEXes that lets you buy or sell an asset instantly
swap.priceImpactTooltip: Price impact is a difference between the actual market price and your price due to trade size.
swap.priceImpactSevere: Price impact over 10% may cause a significant loss of funds. Please bear this in mind and proceed with an extra caution.
swap.priceImpactNotSevere: Price impact over 1% may cause a difference in the amount you actually receive. Consider this at your own risk.
swap.noAssetFoundToSwap: No asset was found to swap
swap.pairNotAvailable: Selected pair is not available in any liquidity pool
swap.adaDepositTooltip: A small ADA deposit that will be returned when your order is processed or canceled
swap.guaranteedMin: Guaranteed minimum amount based on current liquidity and market conditions.
swap.minimumAssetsTooltip: The minimum amount you are guaranteed to receive in case of price slippage
swap.lpFeeTooltip: A fixed 0.3% operational fee paid to liquidity providers as a reward for supplying tokens, enabling traders to buy and sell assets on the decentralized Cardano network
swap.checkTx: Check this transaction in the list of wallet transactions
swap.txNotProcessed: Your transaction has not been processed properly due to technical issues
swap.notEnoughBalanceFees: Not enough balance, please consider the fees
swap.startDoingSwaps: Start doing the swap operations to see your open orders here
swap.testnet.message: Switch networks to be able to use Swap in Yoroi
swap.testnet.title: Swap is only available on the mainnet
testnet.shelley.label.message: ESTÁS EN LA RED DE PRUEBA.
transfer.form.instructions.step1.text: Tardará aproximadamente 1 minuto en restablecer tu saldo. En el siguiente paso, se presentará una transacción que moverá todos tus fondos. Por favor, revisa los detalles de la transacción cuidadosamente. Para realizar dicha transacción, deberás pagar una comisión por transacción estándar en la red de Cardano.

wallet.add.optionDialog.connect.hw.ledge: Una billetera de hardware Ledger es un dispositivo USB pequeño que agrega un nivel de seguridad adicional a tu billetera. Es más seguro porque tu clave privada nunca sale de tu billetera de hardware. Esto protege tus fondos, aún cuando tu computadora es comprometida debido a malware, ataques de phishing, etc.
wallet.add.optionDialog.connect.hw.trezo: Una billetera de hardware Trezor es un dispositivo USB pequeño que agrega un nivel de seguridad adicional a tu billetera. Es más seguro porque tu clave privada nunca sale de tu billetera de hardware. Esto protege tus fondos, aún cuando tu computadora es comprometida debido a malware, ataques de phishing, etc.
wallet.add.optionDialog.restore.normalWa: Si posees una frase de recuperación de {length} palabras, elige esta opción para restaurar tu billetera.
Ingresa una frase de recuperación de {length} palabras
wallet.add.optionDialog.restore.paperWal: Si has generado una billetera de papel de Yoroi (la cual generalmente se imprime y resguarda off-line), puedes elegir esta opción para importar tus fondos.
wallet.add.optionDialog.walletEra.byronE: Las billeteras creadas antes del 29 de julio de 2020 son billeteras de la era Byron y no pueden delegar.

and create a Yoroi wallet.

If you had any ADA in your wallet on November 29th, 2019
    you have to upgrade your wallet to a Shelley "reward wallet".
wallet.backup.privacy.warning.dialog.che: Asegura de que nadie vea tu pantalla, a menos que desees que tengan acceso a tus fondos.
wallet.backup.privacy.warning.dialog.rec: En la siguiente pantalla, verás un conjunto de 15 palabras aleatorias. Esta es la frase de recuperación de tu billetera. Se puede ingresar en cualquier versión de Yoroi para respaldar o restaurar los fondos de tu billetera y la clave privada.
wallet.backup.recovery.phrase.display.di:
Por favor, escribe cuidadosamente esta frase de recuperación en un lugar seguro.
    La necesitarás para usar y restaurar tu billetera. La frase distingue entre mayúsculas y minúsculas.
wallet.backup.recovery.phrase.entry.dial: Comprendo que mis claves secretas se guardan de forma segura sólo en este dispositivo, no en los servidores de la empresa.

Comprendo que si esta aplicación se mueve a otro dispositivo o se elimina, mis fondos sólo podrán
     ser restaurados con la frase de recuperación que he escrito y guardado en un lugar seguro.
Haz clic en cada palabra, en el orden correcto, para validar la frase de recuperación
wallet.connect.hw.dialog.step.about.prer: Tu computadora debe permanecer conectada a Internet durante todo el proceso.

La aplicación Cardano ADA debe estar instalada en el dispositivo Ledger.

El dispositivo Ledger debe permanecer conectado a tu computadora durante todo el proceso.

wallet.create.dialog.howToSaveRecoveryPh: Make sure no one is looking at your screen.
It is recommended to have 2 or 3 copies of the recovery phrase in different secure locations.
Write the recovery phrase on a piece of paper and store in a secure location like a safety deposit box.
How to save your recovery phrase?
wallet.create.dialog.name.label: Nombre de la billetera
Remember: you are the only person who should know this recovery phrase.
DO NOT share the recovery phrase as this will allow anyone to access your assets and wallet.
If you lose your recovery phrase, it will not be possible to recover your wallet.
The recovery phrase is the only way to access your wallet.
Yoroi will NEVER ask for the recovery phrase. Watch out for scammers and impersonators.
Read this before saving your recovery phrase
wallet.create.dialog.title: Crear billetera
wallet.create.dialog.walletChecksum.firs: {plateImg} Wallet checksum is a generic Blockie image that is generated to visually distinguish your wallet from others.
wallet.create.dialog.walletChecksum.seco: Plate number {plateText} is a auto-generated sign of four letters and four digits.
wallet.create.dialog.walletChecksum.thir: Checksum and plate number are unique to your wallet and represent your public key.
wallet.create.dialog.walletChecksum.titl: What is wallet checksum and plate number?
wallet.create.dialog.walletNameAndPasswo: It is a wallet identifier that helps you to easier find the exact wallet in your app
You can have different wallet names for the same wallet account connected to different devices
Password is an additional security layer used to confirm transactions from this device
Both wallet name and password are stored locally, so you are only person who can change or restore it.
wallet.create.firstStep.description: A recovery phrase is a secret series of words that can be used to recover your Yoroi Wallet. See the video below how to use a recovery phrase.

wallet.create.firstStep.thirdTip: If you lose your recovery phrase, it will not be possible to recover your wallet

wallet.currency.pick.testnetDescription: Las testnets son cadenas alternativas que se utilizan exclusivamente para pruebas. Esto permite a los desarrolladores de aplicaciones o testers experimentar sin tener que usar monedas reales.
wallet.dashboard.empty.text: Dirígete a la sección de delegación para elegir el stake pool al que quieres delegar.

wallet.dashboard.lessthan.reason1: El stake pool en el que delegas ha estado o está fuera de línea, así que no creó ningún bloque
wallet.dashboard.lessthan.reason2: No ha pasado suficiente tiempo desde que has delegado
wallet.dashboard.lessthan.reason4: El stake pool en el que delegas cobra una comisión fija mayor que la recompensa total del pool

wallet.settings.delete.warning1.cashback: Removing this wallet will not impact its balance, but as it the rewards wallet, this may disrupt your cashback process. You can also use another wallet for connecting the cashback before removing this wallet.
wallet.settings.delete.warning2: Por favor, comprueba que todavía tienes los medios para restaurar el acceso a esta billetera. Si no puedes, eliminar la billetera puede resultar en una pérdida irreversible de los fondos.

wallet.staking.availableTotalRewardsHelp: If the Reward amount is different than expected, see possible reasons of that on our {faqLink}.

wallet.transfer.deregister.line1: Al retirar las recompensas, también tienes la opción de desregistrar la clave de delegación
wallet.transfer.deregister.line2: Desregistrando la clave de delegación recuperarás tu depósito y retirarás la clave sobre cualquier pool
wallet.transfer.deregister.line3: Manteniendo la clave de delegación te permitirá retirar las recompensas, pero continuarás delegando en el mismo pool
wallet.transfer.deregister.line4: NO debes desregistrarte si esta clave de delegación se utiliza como una cuenta de recompensa del pool, ya que esto hará que todas las recompensas del operador del pool sean enviadas directamente a la reserva
wallet.transfer.deregister.line5: La cancelación del registro significa que esta clave ya no recibirá recompensas hasta que vuelvas a registrar la llave de delegación (normalmente delegando nuevamente en un stake pool)

wallet.transitionDialog.poolContinues: This pool continues to generate staking rewards
wallet.transitionDialog.poolStop: This pool will stop generating staking rewards in
wallet.transitionDialog.poolNotGeneratin: This pool is NOT generating staking rewards anymore
wallet.undelegation.transaction.warning: Your rewards will automatically get withdrawn once you undelegate from a stake pool. You will also receive back your staking deposit of 2 ADA. If you wish to choose another stake pool, you can change your preference without undelegation.
wallet.unsupported.subtitle: The selected wallet does not support this functionality
wallet.unsupported.title: This wallet type is incompatible.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.confirm.line1: Introduce el PIN, ya que lo necesitarás cada vez que quieras acceder a la aplicación Catalyst Voting.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.pin.line1: Por favor, anota este PIN, ya que lo necesitarás cada vez que quieras acceder a la aplicación Catalyst Voting.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.qr.actionButto: Confirmar que he guardado el código QR
wallet.voting.dialog.step.qr.line2: El siguiente código QR es el certificado generado que requiere la Catalyst App para poder participar en el proceso de votación de Cardano.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.qr.line3: También te sugerimos que hagas una captura de pantalla como copia de seguridad - no podrás acceder a este código QR después de hacer clic en Completar.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.qr.lineTitle: Utilice la aplicación Catalyst Voting para escanear el código QR
wallet.voting.dialog.step.register.line1: Introduzca su contraseña de gastos para poder generar el certificado necesario para votar.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.trx.ledger.inf: After connecting your Ledger device to your computer’s USB port, press the Register button.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.trx.line1: Confirma tu contraseña de gasto para registrar en la blockchain el certificado generado previamente para la votación.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.trx.trezor.inf: After connecting your Trezor device to your computer, press the Register button.
wallet.voting.dialog.title: Inscribirse para votar
wallet.voting.keepDelegated: Your voting power is how much you delegate and the voting rewards will be distributed to your delegation reward address. Please keep delegated until the voting ends.
wallet.voting.ledgerNanoRequirement: <updateLink>Update</updateLink> the Cardano app on your Ledger to version 6 or above with <ledgerLiveLink>Ledger Live</ledgerLiveLink>.
wallet.voting.line2: Antes de empezar, asegúrate de completar los siguientes pasos
wallet.voting.line3: Descarga la aplicación Catalyst Voting App.
wallet.voting.line4: Abre la Catalyst Voting App y haz clic en el botón Completar registro.
wallet.voting.lineTitle: Registrarse para votar en el { fundName }
wallet.voting.notDelegated: You haven't delegated anything. Your voting power is determined by the amount you delegate and voting rewards are distributed to your delegation reward address. Please remember to delegate prior to voting.
wallet.voting.trezorTRequirement: <updateLink>Update</updateLink> your Trezor device firmware version to 2.4.1 or above.
wallet.withdrawRewards.transaction.title: Withdraw reward
wallet.withdrawal.transaction.unregister: Esta transacción desregistrará una o más claves de delegación, devolviendo las {refundAmount} {ticker} de tu depósito
yoroiTransfer.error.noTransferTxError: No hay ninguna transacción de transferencia para enviar.
yoroiTransfer.error.transferFundsError: No se pudieron transferir los fondos.
yoroiTransfer.error.walletChangedError: La billetera se ha modificado. Por favor, vuelve a confirmar la transacción.
yoroiTransfer.form.instructions.step0Pap: Ingresa la frase de recuperación de 21 palabras de tu billetera de papel de Yoroi, y la contraseña asignada, para restaurar el saldo y transferir todos los fondos.
yoroiTransfer.successPage.text: Tus fondos fueron transferidos con éxito.
yoroiTransfer.successPage.title: éxito
yoroiTransfer.waiting.progressInfo.check: Verificando los fondos de las direcciones

governance.participateDialog.title: Withdraw warning
governance.participateDialog.contentInfo: To withdraw your rewards, you need to participate in the Cardano Governance. Your rewards will continue to accumulate, but you are only able to withdraw it once you join the Governance process.
governance.participatingInGovernance: Participating in the Cardano Governance gives you the opportunity to participate in the voting as well as withdraw your staking rewards
governance.designatedSomeone: You are designating someone else to cast your vote on your behalf for all proposals now and in the future.

transaction.review.enterPassword: Enter password to sign this transaction
transaction.review.identifyDrep: Identify your preferred DRep and enter their ID below to delegate your vote:
transaction.review.collateralInfo: Collateral is mandatory when interacting with certain smart contracts on Cardano. ADA will only be deduced from your collateral if transaction validation fails.
transaction.review.interactWithOperation: You are about to interact with operations, which are key components used in governance and various blockchain activities. These include Cardano Governance Certificates, as outlined in CIP-0095, which facilitate governance transactions.
transaction.review.takeHardwareWallet: Take your hardware wallet device and follow the instructions there. Make sure you confirm a trusted action.
transaction.review.rewardsWithdraw: Your rewards will automatically get withdrawn once you undelegate from a stake pool. You will also receive back your staking deposit of 2 ADA. If you wish to choose another stake pool, you can change your preference without undelegation.
